title: payment watcher scan height not persisted: payments missed after restart
description: payment_watcher.rs last_scanned_height is entirely in-memory. On relay restart, the watcher starts fresh at tip - INITIAL_LOOKBACK (100 blocks). Any payment confirmed in a block older than 100 blocks before restart is never scanned again. The invoice remains pending until it expires; the subscription never activates and the user has no recourse. Fix: persist last_scanned_height to the store (e.g. a new payment_watcher_state table) and restore it on startup, falling back to tip-INITIAL_LOOKBACK only when no persisted value exists.
